core_positioning: Builds the system that runs sales, not just sales activity itself
Combines revenue operations, outbound pipeline design, and AI-assisted workflows
Strongest fit in B2B manufacturing, industrial, pharma, and nutraceutical environments

quantified_wins.statement: Built more than $6M in outbound pipeline through targeted prospecting and outbound systems design.
Generated 3,700+ new accounts through territory planning, targeted outreach, and commercial execution.
Acquired 1,000+ new customers across industrial, healthcare, and B2B markets.
Exceeded retention targets above 93 percent while expanding account relationships.
Recruited, trained, and managed a 5-person sales team that exceeded goals year over year.
Contributed to a 20 percent sales increase through cross-sell, training, and account development initiatives.

industrial: Commercial systems builder for technical markets
revops: Sales operations and pipeline systems leader
ai_gtm: AI workflow operator for commercial teams

industrial_manufacturing: Lead with industrial credibility, complex sales-cycle experience, and alignment with operations and engineering teams.
Emphasize pipeline visibility, quoting alignment, and account development in technical markets.
pharma_nutraceutical: Highlight structured outreach, regulated-market credibility, and experience supporting commercial growth across pharma-adjacent markets.

revops_salesops: Frame yourself as the operator who installs visibility, targeting logic, funnel discipline, and workflow clarity.
